Video.summary: A bass fishing trip goes horribly wrong when a bolt of lightning strikes their boat, leaving Seventeen-year-old Christian Neal burned and unconscious and his father Gabe blown into the water and paralyzed. It will take a miracle to save them.
Video.title: Fight To Survive | Lightning Strike

Image.alt: Fight To Survive | Lightning Strike
Fight To Survive | Lightning Strike
Fight To Survive | Lightning Strike

Video.summary: Tragedy strikes as best friends Ed Cohen and Ken Henderson are stranded adrift in hostile waters.
Video.title: Fight To Survive | Ken Henderson Story

Image.alt: Fight To Survive | Ken Henderson Story
Fight To Survive | Ken Henderson Story
Fight To Survive | Ken Henderson Story

Video.summary: In what is regarded as one of greatest survival stories of the 20th Century, sailor Steven Callahan finds himself alone and adrift in a life raft after his boat, the Napoleon Solo sinks in the mid Atlantic.
Video.title: Fight To Survive | Adrift Part 1

Image.alt: Fight To Survive | Adrift Part 1
Fight To Survive | Adrift Part 1
Fight To Survive | Adrift Part 1

Video.summary: Hunters Adrian Knopps and Garrett Hagen venture into the remotest part of Alaska's Misty Fjord, hunting Moose and Bear. After a successful hunt Adrian finds himself trapped by a twenty foot tidal surge after Garrett fails to return with the skiff.
Video.title: Fight To Survive | Stranded in the Alaska Wilderness Part 1

Image.alt: Fight To Survive | Stranded in the Alaska Wilderness Part 1
Fight To Survive | Stranded in the Alaska Wilderness Part 1
Fight To Survive | Stranded in the Alaska Wilderness Part 1

Video.summary: Facing starvation, dehydration and predators from the deep, sailor Steven Callahan fights to survive not only the physical hardships, but also the mental and emotional strain of being adrift and alone in a disintegrating life raft.
Video.title: Fight To Survive | Adrift Part 2

Image.alt: Fight To Survive | Adrift Part 2
Fight To Survive | Adrift Part 2
Fight To Survive | Adrift Part 2

Video.summary: In an isolated mountain river, Fisherman Dean Ririe becomes hopelessly trapped under a boulder in water up to his neck. In icy waters that should kill a man, Dean fights for his life miles from help.
Video.title: Fight To Survive | A River's Grasp

Image.alt: Fight To Survive | A River's Grasp
Fight To Survive | A River's Grasp
Fight To Survive | A River's Grasp

Video.summary: Justin and Jeremy Harris' weekend decent into a remote Utah canyon becomes a survival nightmare when Justin severely breaks his leg. As night fast approaches and temperatures drop below freezing, how will these two brothers survive?
Video.title: Fight To Survive | Nightmare Canyon Pt. 1

Image.alt: Fight To Survive | Nightmare Canyon Pt. 1
Fight To Survive | Nightmare Canyon Pt. 1
Fight To Survive | Nightmare Canyon Pt. 1

Video.summary: After a successful hunt., Adrian Knopps' hunting partner disappears taking their bear out to the boat. Now Adrian finds himself stranded on a tidal flat surround by bears and wolf packs and with massive storm bearing down on him. How will he survive?
Video.title: Fight To Survive | Stranded in the Alaska Wilderness Part 2

Image.alt: Fight To Survive | Stranded in the Alaska Wilderness Part 2
Fight To Survive | Stranded in the Alaska Wilderness Part 2
Fight To Survive | Stranded in the Alaska Wilderness Part 2

Video.summary: Ed Rosenthal set out for a short hike in Joshua Tree National Park, but in the heat of the day he became turned around and lost. His six-day ordeal of survival in blazing temperatures with no food or water is nothing short of miraculous.
Video.title: Fight To Survive | Under the Desert Sun

Image.alt: Fight To Survive | Under the Desert Sun
Fight To Survive | Under the Desert Sun
Fight To Survive | Under the Desert Sun

Video.summary: Follow hunter Jamey Mosch into the Florida everglades as his hunting trips turns into a four day nightmare.
Video.title: Fight To Survive | Jamey Mosch

Image.alt: Fight To Survive | Jamey Mosch
Fight To Survive | Jamey Mosch
Fight To Survive | Jamey Mosch

Video.summary: Facing starvation, dehydration and predators from the deep, sailor Steven Callahan fights to survive not only the physical hardships, but also the mental and emotional strain of being adrift and alone in a disintegrating life raft.
Video.title: Fight To Survive | Adrift Part 2

Image.alt: Fight To Survive | Adrift Part 2
Fight To Survive | Adrift Part 2
Fight To Survive | Adrift Part 2

Video.summary: While hiking alone deep in Glacier National Park, Ted Porter plummets into an icy glacial crevasse.
Video.title: Fight To Survive | Trapped in a Glacier

Image.alt: Fight To Survive | Trapped in a Glacier
Fight To Survive | Trapped in a Glacier
Fight To Survive | Trapped in a Glacier

Video.summary: Ed Rosenthal set out for a short hike in Joshua Tree National Park, but in the heat of the day he became turned around and lost. His six-day ordeal of survival in blazing temperatures with no food or water is nothing short of miraculous.
Video.title: Fight To Survive | Under the Desert Sun

Image.alt: Fight To Survive | Under the Desert Sun
Fight To Survive | Under the Desert Sun
Fight To Survive | Under the Desert Sun

Video.summary: After a successful hunt., Adrian Knopps' hunting partner disappears taking their bear out to the boat. Now Adrian finds himself stranded on a tidal flat surround by bears and wolf packs and with massive storm bearing down on him. How will he survive?
Video.title: Fight To Survive | Stranded in the Alaska Wilderness Part 2

Video.summary: Justin and Jeremy Harris' weekend descent into a remote Utah canyon becomes a survival nightmare when Justin severely breaks his leg. As night fast approaches and temperatures drop below freezing, how will these two brothers survive?
Video.title: Fight To Survive | Nightmare Canyon Pt. 2

Image.alt: Fight To Survive | Nightmare Canyon Pt. 2
Fight To Survive | Nightmare Canyon Pt. 2
Fight To Survive | Nightmare Canyon Pt. 2

Video.summary: A springtime blizzard has firefighters working overtime; a pickup hits a semi; a space heater sparks a fire.
Video.title: Hellfire Heroes | Weather Extremes

Image.alt: Hellfire Heroes | Weather Extremes
Hellfire Heroes | Weather Extremes
Hellfire Heroes | Weather Extremes

Video.summary: Trouble during a training session; a rollover traps 4 people and ejects 2 others into a swift-moving river.
Video.title: Hellfire Heroes | What It Takes

Image.alt: Hellfire Heroes | What It Takes
Hellfire Heroes | What It Takes
Hellfire Heroes | What It Takes

Video.summary: A springtime blizzard has firefighters working overtime; a pickup hits a semi; a space heater sparks a fire.
Video.title: Hellfire Heroes | Weather Extremes

Image.alt: Hellfire Heroes | Weather Extremes
Hellfire Heroes | Weather Extremes
Hellfire Heroes | Weather Extremes

Video.summary: Trouble during a training session; a rollover traps 4 people and ejects 2 others into a swift-moving river.
Video.title: Hellfire Heroes | What It Takes

Image.alt: Hellfire Heroes | What It Takes
Hellfire Heroes | What It Takes
Hellfire Heroes | What It Takes

Video.summary: A springtime blizzard has firefighters working overtime; a pickup hits a semi; a space heater sparks a fire.
Video.title: Hellfire Heroes | Weather Extremes

Image.alt: Hellfire Heroes | Weather Extremes
Hellfire Heroes | Weather Extremes
Hellfire Heroes | Weather Extremes

Video.summary: From the intense to the unusual to the just plain wacky, Extreme Weather Countdown is home to everything the elements have to offer, and it's time for an all-new episode. We'll work our way through snow, wind, fog, lightning, and more, so fasten your seatbelts and let's get started.
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Free Rain

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Free Rain
Extreme Weather Countdown | Free Rain
Extreme Weather Countdown | Free Rain

Video.summary: Floods give way to rainbows and tornadoes twist into hailstorms on today’s intense Extreme Weather Countdown!
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | In Cold Flood

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | In Cold Flood
Extreme Weather Countdown | In Cold Flood
Extreme Weather Countdown | In Cold Flood

Video.summary: Today’s forecast: thunder, lightning, and high winds. Oh, and lots of tornadoes.
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Who Wants to Play Twister?

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Who Wants to Play Twister?
Extreme Weather Countdown | Who Wants to Play Twister?
Extreme Weather Countdown | Who Wants to Play Twister?

Video.summary: Pipes freeze, snow falls, and people slip on the aftermath in today’s ice cold Extreme Weather Countdown
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Cold as Ice

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Cold as Ice
Extreme Weather Countdown | Cold as Ice
Extreme Weather Countdown | Cold as Ice

Video.summary: You’re in for some wild, wild weather today as tumbleweeds, snow, and lightning all pile up!
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Expect the Unexpected

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Expect the Unexpected
Extreme Weather Countdown | Expect the Unexpected
Extreme Weather Countdown | Expect the Unexpected

Video.summary: Tornadoes twist at sea, hail pounds the Earth, and trees topple over on today’s Extreme Weather Countdown!
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Bubble, Bubble, Hail & Trouble

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Bubble, Bubble, Hail & Trouble
Extreme Weather Countdown | Bubble, Bubble, Hail & Trouble
Extreme Weather Countdown | Bubble, Bubble, Hail & Trouble

Video.summary: Today, cruise ships tilt, houses succumb to blizzards, and wind stops people in their tracks.
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Waterlogged

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Waterlogged
Extreme Weather Countdown | Waterlogged
Extreme Weather Countdown | Waterlogged

Video.summary: Record setting snowfall, tidal waves, rainfall, and flooding all make history in this noteworthy countdown.
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Storms for the Record Books

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Storms for the Record Books
Extreme Weather Countdown | Storms for the Record Books
Extreme Weather Countdown | Storms for the Record Books
